.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Update the CircleCI Docker image to use OpenJDK 21 to match the application's target Java version.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The application code is compiled for Java 21; running tests on a Java 17 image would cause runtime failures or incompatibility with Java 21-specific features.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Uncomment and update the Jira orb dependency to enable Jira integration in the CI pipeline.
Uncomment the build workflow definition to activate the Jira notification post-step.
.circleci/config.yml.after:
build:
    jobs:
      - build-and-test:
#          context: JIRA_WEBHOOK
          post-steps:
            - jira/notify

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties to 21 for compilation and runtime targeting.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without updating these properties, the project would still target Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially failing if strict JDK 21 compliance is enforced by the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven compiler source and target to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler plugin configuration must match the target JDK version to ensure bytecode compatibility with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade internal zeus-library dependency to version 2.0.21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The new library version likely contains breaking changes or dependencies compatible with Spring Boot 3/Java 21.
Spring Boot 3 may no longer include hibernate-validator transitively or requires a specific version compatible with Jakarta EE 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency to replace old springdoc version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old springdoc-openapi-ui is not compatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace); the starter-webmvc-ui is the required replacement.
Spring Boot 3 dependency management changes may require explicit declaration of webflux if used.

src/main/java/com/brihaspathee/zeus/conf.general_idea: Add explicit @OpenAPIDefinition annotation to the configuration class to satisfy stricter validation or explicit definition requirements in the newer environment.
Add the corresponding import for the new @OpenAPIDefinition annotation.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Add configuration for the member management service URL.
Disable Hibernate SQL logging and formatting in the default configuration.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.before:
properties:
      hibernate:
        show_sql: true
        format_sql: true
src/main/resources/application.yaml.after:
#    properties:
#      hibernate:
#        show_sql: true
#        format_sql: true
#        debug: true

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Add Kafka producer configuration for string keys and JSON values.
Add Kafka consumer configuration for string keys and JSON values with trusted packages.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.after:
consumer:
      group-id: zeus-account-processor-consumer-group
      enable-auto-commit: true
      auto-offset-reset: earliest
      key-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer
      value-deserializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonDeserializer
      properties:
        spring:
          json:
            trusted:
              packages: "*"

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Enable Flyway clean operation in the configuration.
Set Spring Data JPA logging level to INFO.

src/test/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Add configuration for a member management service URL endpoint.
Disable Hibernate SQL logging and formatting in test configuration.
src/test/resources/application.yaml.before:
properties:
      hibernate:
        show_sql: true
        format_sql: true
src/test/resources/application.yaml.after:
#    properties:
#      hibernate:
#        show_sql: true
#        format_sql: true

src/test/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Add Kafka producer configuration for test environment.
Add Kafka consumer configuration for test environment.
src/test/resources/application.yaml.after:
consumer:
      group-id: zeus-account-processor-consumer-group
      enable-auto-commit: true
      auto-offset-reset: earliest
      key-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer
      value-deserializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonDeserializer
      properties:
        spring:
          json:
            trusted:
              packages: "*"
